label: WordPress — CMS Admin
description: WordPress CMS admin panel. Classic or block editor (Gutenberg). Login page at /wp-admin or /wp-login.php. Dashboard, posts/pages list, block editor, media library, plugin settings.
source_patterns: Login: type username/email → pause → type password → submit → wait 2-4s for dashboard
Dashboard overview: glance at At a Glance, Quick Draft, Activity — no clicks, 3-5s scan
Posts/Pages list: vertical scroll through table rows, hover row for action links (Edit|Quick Edit|Trash), click title to open editor

Block editor (Gutenberg): click title input → type post title → click below to add block → type / to search blocks → select paragraph/image/heading → type content → click Publish → select visibility → confirm
Media Library: click Add New → select file(s) → wait for upload progress → edit alt text → copy URL
Settings pages: scroll form sections, toggle checkboxes, save changes at bottom

active_hours.description: Business hours, content creation — weekday mornings for writing, afternoons for publishing

scroll.description: Admin list vertical scroll, editor content scroll — slower for comprehension

mouse.description: Business speed — deliberate, precise targeting in toolbar menus

platform_specific.sequence_hint: login → dashboard scan → navigate Posts → scroll list → click post title → editor: title → insert blocks → write content → publish flow → media if needed → settings review
